{"dg-publish":true,"permalink":"/world-azerith/transin/quish/","tags":["location"],"dg-note-properties":{"tags":["location"]}}
---

	A city surrounded by a large brick wall covered in frost. 

![Quish.jpg](/img/user/Images/Quish.jpg)

## Information 

**Population:** Large City

Quish is a large city protected by a large stone keep in the west of [[World - Azerith/Transin/Transin\|Transin]]. The city is very carefully protected with guards using magic and booby traps. Icicles line the outside of the city and can be dropped on invaders if necessary. 

This city is about as high-fantasy as it gets, full of markets and small buildings to explore. Knights known as "warriors of frost" roam the streets acting as a police force. 

## Market 

There is a bustling market in

Race: Deep Gnome Alignment: Neutral Evil - Sleazy Notes: Wants Money, Says as much

Sex: Male Voice: New Jersey

Pronouns: He/Him Physical Image: Stocky

Intro Line: Pssst. Come over here, I’ve got some great deals!

Reputation: 

Negative 3 Points: + 3 handfuls. 

Negative 2 Points: Disadvantage on PRE

Negative 1 Points: + 1 handful. 

**Zero Points:** ______

One Point: Advantage on PRE

| Name                          | Feature                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Price                |
| ----------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------- |
| Ring of Silence               | Spend 2H to make your footsteps silent until you rest.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | 5 handfuls.          |
| Ring of Unbreakable Resolve   | Once per session you can cancel one fear with 4 hopes.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | 2 bags + 7 handfuls. |
| Ring of Animal Influence      | Spend 1S to succeed on a PRE check with an animal (within reason).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | 5 handfuls.          |
| Glowing Rings                 | Weapon (Agility, Very close, d10 +2 mag, one hand)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | 5 handfuls.          |
| Improved Glowing<br><br>Rings | Weapon (Agility, Very close, d10 +5 mag, one hand)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | One bag.             |
| Ring of Truth Telling         | Mark 1S to gain advantage on an instinct check to see if someone is lying.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | 1 handfuls           |
| Ring of Mind Shielding        | While wearing this ring, you are immune to magic that allows other creatures to read your thoughts,<br><br>determine whether you are lying, know your align is ment, or know your creature type. Creatures can telepathically communicate with you only if you allow it. You can use an action to cause the ring to become invisible until you use another action to make it visible. until you remove the ring, or until you die.<br><br>If you die while wearing the ring, your soul enters it, unless it already houses a soul. You must remain in the ring and can not depart for the afterlife. As long as your soul is in the ring, you can telepathically communicate with any creature wearing it. A wearer can't prevent this telepathic communication. | 1 bag, 5 handfuls    |
| Regular Rings                 | N/A                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | 1 handful            |
| Nobel Rings                   | Advantage on PRE                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | 1 bag                |
